title: selaginella scabrida
intro: Selaginella scabrida, also known as the prickly spikemoss, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is a small, terrestrial plant that grows close to the ground and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing infections. Selaginella scabrida is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
